title: Ischnosiphon spicatus

This family is part of the order Aquifoliales, which comprises several genera of flowering plants. Ischnosiphon spicatus is a species of flowering plant, and it belongs to the genus Ischnosiphon. The genus Ischnosiphon is native to Central and South America, and it contains several species of plants. Ischnosiphon spicatus is a specific species within this genus.
